summary: Iter 7 verifies iter-6 security hardening + CORS fix. Backend: 79/79 pytest pass. Cookie-only auth: localStorage stays empty (no vk_token) before+after login, document.cookie does NOT expose access_token (httpOnly Secure SameSite=none confirmed via Set-Cookie inspection on POST /api/auth/login). DOMPurify XSS sanitization: both newsletter (3253 chars) and weekly-report (2910 chars) previews render via DOMPurify.sanitize(); inspected DOM has 0 <script> tags and 0 onerror= / onclick= attributes; 0 dialog alerts triggered. Logout: button click clears session, redirects to /admin/login, no console.warn appears (API succeeds path). Stable keys: zero React 'index as key' warnings observed across /, /events (calendar w/ ISO date keys), /swordfighting (sword.factN keys). DOMPurify import scoped only to AdminDashboard.jsx (verified via grep). CORS middleware: backend at localhost:8001 correctly echoes the request Origin and sets access-control-allow-credentials:true (not '*'). NOTE: Kubernetes ingress in this preview env REWRITES the public response to access-control-allow-origin:'*' even when credentials are required — this could only matter for genuine cross-origin browser POSTs; the actual frontend (events-refresh-1.preview.emergentagent.com) is same-origin with the backend so the ingress rewrite is a no-op in practice. Backwards-compat: the JWT is still returned in the JSON body of /api/auth/login (per-spec OK; frontend ignores it).
critical_code_review_comments: auth.js login() no longer writes any token to localStorage — verified via grep: only 'vk_lang' (language preference) remains in localStorage usage. Good.
api.js axios instance uses withCredentials:true and no Authorization-header request interceptor — clean cookie-only flow.
DOMPurify is imported only at /app/frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.jsx:3 — single ~90KB import, not pulled into public bundles. Good.

AdminDashboard.jsx wraps both preview innerHTML mounts with DOMPurify.sanitize() (lines 207 and 283). Verified at runtime: no <script>, no onerror= attributes survived in DOM after rendering real previews.

Stable keys correctly applied: Swordfighting fact cards use sword.fact1/2/3 (line 72), Home steps use translated title (line 110), EventCalendar cells use cellKey ISO-date (line 112) and event rows use ev.id+isoDay() (line 142).
logout() in auth.js wraps the logout API call in try/catch and only console.warn()s on failure — does not block setUser(false). Matches the specified behavior.
CORS middleware in server.py:585-602 chooses allow_origin_regex='.*' branch only when CORS_ORIGINS is unset/'*', else falls back to explicit allowlist. Sound design.

Public-URL response carries access-control-allow-origin:'*' AND access-control-allow-credentials:true together — this comes from the K8s ingress (verified by comparing to localhost:8001 response which correctly echoes the origin). Not a server bug; flagging for awareness in case any future cross-origin embedding is required.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (cookie-only auth, DOMPurify XSS-safe previews, stable keys, clean logout)

test_credentials: admin@viikinkitapahtumat.fi / ***REDACTED*** — verified working, login still returns 200 + Set-Cookie httpOnly Secure SameSite=none; JSON body still contains 'token' (backwards-compat, frontend does not read it).
seed_data_creation: None this iteration; pytest tests self-clean any TEST_iter5_* events.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public URL: https://events-refresh-1.preview.emergentagent.com (same-origin frontend+backend through ingress). Admin login: /admin/login → fill email + password → press Enter (form submit). Login button label is 'KIRJAUDU' (FI). Pre-login 401s on /api/auth/me are EXPECTED noise (AuthProvider cold load). For DOMPurify XSS regression test, query 'div.bg-viking-bg' (preview container class on AdminDashboard.jsx) and assert 0 querySelector('script') matches. CORS: when testing CORS via curl through the public URL note the K8s ingress overrides headers; for true backend CORS test hit http://localhost:8001 directly which returns the FastAPI middleware-correct echoed origin.
rca of the issue: No issues found. All iter-6 hardening items work end-to-end.
